findings.summary: PHASE-XX.md omits a unit-test authoring task; engineer cannot produce test files because src/cache.test.kt is not in <files>.writes and no test task exists in the task list.
findings.remediation: Add a task to the phase plan: 'Author unit tests in src/cache.test.kt covering insertion, eviction, and overflow' and extend the <files>.writes JSON to include 'src/cache.test.kt'. This unblocks the engineer's next attempt.
